agentAbility.name: Hunting Time
agentAbility.description: Launches a TV missile that destroys marked lower-HP enemies and Traces others. Each destruction recharges the Ultimate for a short time.

primaryAttack.name: Single Shot
primaryAttack.description: Requires reload after each shot, most accurate when stationary.

tankAbilities.name: Decoy
tankAbilities.description: Deploys a decoy identical to the tank; if destroyed, it Traces the enemy who destroyed it.

tankAbilities.name: Trapping Shot
tankAbilities.description: The next shot Immobilizes the target, then triggers a chain of small explosions around them.
